items.title: Teen shark attack in Alabama inspires start of a national alert system
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>Lulu Gribbin, who survived a near-fatal shark attack in 2024, has inspired federal legislation authorizing shark bite alerts. President Trump last week signed "Lulu’s Law" authorizes emergency alerts messages for shark attacks in the area.

Subscribe: http://smarturl.it/AssociatedPress 
Read more: https://apnews.com​

This video may be available for archive licensing via https://newsroom.ap.org/home</article>

items.title: Fans gather outside Madison Square Garden for Taylor Swift's wedding
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>"It's our version of a royal wedding." Taylor Swift fans gather outside Madison Square Garden for the pop megastar's marriage to Travis Kelce.

#TaylorSwift #TaylorSwiftWedding #TravisKelce #Swifties</article>

items.title: Portugal fans rally and show support before match
items.author: Associated Press
items.content: <article>Thousands of Portugal fans gathered at Stanley Park North and marched to Toronto Stadium ahead of the team’s Round of 32 Knockout Stage match against Croatia.</article>

items.title: Crew rescues a 3-year-old boy trapped for 6 days after Venezuela earthquake
items.author: Associated Press
items.content: <article>A toddler who had been trapped for six days under a collapsed building in Venezuela was rescued Tuesday, National Assembly President Jorge Rodríguez said. Footage showed Jordanian rescuers cheering as they pulled the limp but responsive boy, covered in dust, out from the rubble.</article>

items.title: Olivia Wilde on her vision for 'The Invite'
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>Olivia Wilde says she avoided cinematic flourishes when directing “The Invite”: “It was like tying my hands behind my back.”

#OliviaWilde #TheInvite</article>

items.title: Couple snaps a photo of a bear chasing a moose calf in Maine
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>A married couple in Maine saw a large bear chasing a calf moose down a rural roadway and were able to capture some photos of the chase. (AP Video: Dylan Lovan).

Photo credit: Elvia J. Malcolm

Subscribe: http://smarturl.it/AssociatedPress

items.title: Portugal vs. Croatia: LIVE watch party of 2026 FIFA World Cup
items.author: Associated Press
items.content: <article>Live from Lisbon as fans gather to watch Portugal vs. Croatia in their round of 32 match of the 2026 FIFA World Cup.</article>

items.title: Here's a look at the luxury jet now serving as Trump’s Air Force One
items.author: Associated Press
items.content: <article>From lie-flat seats and plush carpets to a redesigned exterior, here's a look at the Boeing 747-800 now serving as President Donald Trump’s Air Force One.</article>

items.title: Spain vs. Austria: LIVE watch party of 2026 FIFA World Cup
items.author: Associated Press
items.content: <article>Live from Madrid as fans gather to watch Spain vs. Austria in their round of 32 match of the 2026 FIFA World Cup.</article>

items.title: Ex-Olympic canoe racer indicted over alleged Reflecting Pool vandalism
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>A former Olympian was indicted Thursday on a felony charge in what President Donald Trump has called vandalism of the Lincoln Memorial Reflecting Pool, where a renovation project he launched has been riddled with problems.

David Hearn, a former Olympic canoe racer, was indicted on a single count of property destruction in Washington, D.C. court.

Subscribe: http://smarturl.it/AssociatedPress 
Read more: https://apnews.com​

This video may be available for archive licensing via https://newsroom.ap.org/home</article>

items.title: The Associated Press is reporting outside Taylor Swift's wedding
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce’s wedding is slated to begin at 5 p.m. Friday at New York’s Madison Square Garden and could last until 4 a.m. the next morning. The Associated Press is outside, even in a heat wave, to deliver the latest updates on what some are calling "America's royal wedding."

Video by Ted Shaffrey
Produced by Kiki Sideris</article>

items.title: UK apologizes for role in forcing unwed mothers to give up babies for adoption
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>Prime Minister Keir Starmer formally apologized Thursday for the British state’s role in separating tens of thousands of unmarried mothers from their babies, a practice that lasted for decades until the 1970s.

Subscribe: http://smarturl.it/AssociatedPress 
Read more: https://apnews.com​

This video may be available for archive licensing via https://newsroom.ap.org/home</article>

items.title: New York bar owner on street closures for Swift-Kelce wedding
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>Michael O’Brien worries that street closures and added security for Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce's wedding celebration will impact business at his O'Briens Bar & Grill across the street from Madison Square Garden.

#TaylorSwift #TravisKelce #TaylorSwiftWedding</article>

items.title: When is the best time to buy a house? What to know about mortgage rates
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>Mortgage rates play a big role in what you'll pay each month for your home. But with rates constantly changing, waiting for the "perfect" rate could mean missing the right opportunity to buy.

Subscribe: http://smarturl.it/AssociatedPress 
Read more: https://apnews.com​

items.title: LIVE: Outside MSG as guests arrive for Taylor Swift’s wedding rehearsal dinner
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce's wedding is slated to begin Friday evening at New York's Madison Square Garden, according to a copy of a city permit obtained by The Associated Press.

The permit shows 100 guests will begin arriving at MSG Thursday evening for a “pre party celebration," which officials described as an intimate rehearsal dinner.</article>
